title: sempervivum globiferum subsp. hirtum
intro: Sempervivum globiferum subsp. hirtum, commonly known as the Hairy Live Forever, is a succulent plant species belonging to the genus Sempervivum, characterized by its rosettes of fleshy, green leaves with white or yellow flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sempervivum globiferum subsp. hirtum include wound healing, protection against infection, and soothing irritated skin. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in topical creams, salves, and teas to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
